description: A network of orbital relay stations and delivery drones that enables efficient delivery of terraforming payloads to planetary surfaces. Required before precipitation engines or catalyst ships can operate.
A large orbital device that seeds cloud formation and precipitation cycles on a target planet, accelerating hydrological terraforming. Each additional unit increases the rate of atmospheric change.
A specialised vessel that releases catalytic agents into a planet's upper atmosphere, dramatically accelerating chemical reactions needed for breathable air. Multiple ships stack their effect.

A pressurised orbital facility that mass-produces extremophile seed packages and delivers them to the target planet in timed batches. Each active bioreactor contributes one batch to the bio-phase system.
